scores.correctness_notes: Core APIs are correct (temp_model, deploy, wait, all_active), but the gold standard places deploy/wait in the test function itself, not the fixture. The agent's restructured pattern is valid but diverges from the requested 'complete test code' structure. Also claims juju.wait default timeout is 10 minutes; gold standard says default successes=3 with no mention of 10-minute default.
scores.hallucination_notes: status.apps['my-charm'].is_active attribute not in gold standard and likely fabricated; juju.deploy config= keyword parameter not confirmed in gold standard; juju.integrate() not verified; result.success from juju.run() not confirmed. These are plausible but not validated by the gold standard.
